channel.title: Comments on: Sante Fe Brewing: Pale Ale, Ep. 143
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Doc Holloway
item.dc:creator: Doc Holloway
item.description: I enjoy these clips very much , usually with a beer. Dundee India Pale Ale this time.
item.content:encoded: I enjoy these clips very much , usually with a beer. Dundee India Pale Ale this time.
